mapper.insert: /* QueryID : com.kdt.mapper.calendar.saveCalendar Description : 캘린더 일정 등록 Expect Params: COHORT_SN, EVENT_BGNG_DT, EVENT_END_DT, EVENT_NM, RMRK_CN, DEL_YN, USER_SN, EVENT_REG_DT, PRVT_YN */ INSERT INTO TB_CALENDAR ( COHORT_SN, EVENT_BGNG_DT, EVENT_END_DT, EVENT_NM, RMRK_CN, USER_SN, EVENT_REG_DT, PRVT_YN, CO_SN, FRST_REG_USER_SN, EVENT_PLC ) VALUES ( #{cohortSn}, #{eventBgngDt}, #{eventEndDt}, #{eventNm}, #{rmrkCn}, #{userSn}, #{eventRegDt}, #{prvtYn}, #{coSn}, #{userSn}, #{eventPlc} )
mapper.select: SELECT CAL_SN AS calSn, COHORT_SN AS cohortSn, EVENT_BGNG_DT AS eventBgngDt, EVENT_END_DT AS eventEndDt, EVENT_NM AS eventNm, RMRK_CN AS rmrkCn, USER_SN AS userSn, EVENT_REG_DT AS eventRegDt, PRVT_YN AS prvtYn, CO_SN AS coSn FROM TB_CALENDAR WHERE CAL_SN = #{calSn}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_CALENDAR (COHORT_SN, EVENT_BGNG_DT, EVENT_END_DT, EVENT_NM, USER_SN, PRVT_YN, CO_SN, FRST_REG_USER_SN) SELECT up.OGDP_COHORT_SN, #{itvPrnmntDt}, #{itvPrnmntDt}, CONCAT('[면담 일정] ', #{itvTime}, ' ', ua.USER_NM, ' -> ', up.USER_NM), up.USER_SN, 1, #{coSn}, up.USER_SN FROM TB_INTERVIEW i JOIN TB_USER ua ON ua.USER_SN = i.ITV_APLCNT_SN JOIN TB_USER up ON up.USER_SN = i.ITV_PIC_SN WHERE i.ITV_SN = #{itvSn} AND i.ITV_PIC_SN IS NOT NULL;

INSERT INTO TB_CALENDAR (COHORT_SN, EVENT_BGNG_DT, EVENT_END_DT, EVENT_NM, USER_SN, PRVT_YN, CO_SN, FRST_REG_USER_SN) SELECT ua.OGDP_COHORT_SN, #{itvPrnmntDt}, #{itvPrnmntDt}, CONCAT('[면담 일정] ', #{itvTime} ,' ' , ua.USER_NM, ' -> ', up.USER_NM), ua.USER_SN, 1, #{coSn}, up.USER_SN FROM TB_INTERVIEW i JOIN TB_USER ua ON ua.USER_SN = i.ITV_APLCNT_SN JOIN TB_USER up ON up.USER_SN = i.ITV_PIC_SN WHERE i.ITV_SN = #{itvSn} AND i.ITV_PIC_SN IS NOT NULL;
mapper.select: SELECT c.CAL_SN, c.EVENT_BGNG_DT, c.EVENT_END_DT, c.EVENT_NM, c.RMRK_CN, c.EVENT_PLC, c.EVENT_REG_DT, c.PRVT_YN, c.VIEW_CNT, u.USER_NM, c.COHORT_SN FROM TB_CALENDAR c LEFT JOIN TB_USER u ON c.USER_SN = u.USER_SN WHERE c.CAL_SN = #{calSn} AND DEL_YN = 0
mapper.update:
UPDATE TB_CALENDAR c -- 마지막쉼표 자동제거
c.EVENT_BGNG_DT = #{eventBgngDt},
c.EVENT_END_DT = #{eventEndDt},
c.EVENT_NM = #{eventNm},
c.RMRK_CN = #{rmrkCn},
c.PRVT_YN = #{prvtYn},
c.EVENT_PLC = #{eventPlc},
c.COHORT_SN = #{cohortSn},
c.USER_SN = #{userSn}, c.LAST_MDFCN_USER_SN = #{userSn}
WHERE c.CAL_SN = #{calSn} AND DEL_YN = 0
UPDATE TB_CALENDAR SET DEL_YN = 1 WHERE CAL_SN = #{calSn}
